package rulecoverage

func NegativeUuidHashFormattingOnlyForLogs() string {
    ruleID := "uuid_hash_formatting_only_for_logs"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "UUID or hash formatting observed inside loops only for log output."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
